summary: Frontend testing for Staff POS multi-language support and quick-select amount buttons. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Staff POS multi-language support tested successfully. 18 languages available in dropdown. Quick-select amounts are €5, €10, €20, €25, €50, €100. All mode tabs translate correctly when language is changed.

login_functionality.details: Login with admin@edeka-test.de / EdekaTest2026! works correctly

language_selector.details: Globe icon in header opens dropdown with 18 language options in a grid layout

language_switching.german: PASS - Aufladung, Gutschein erstellen, Gutschein einlösen, Zahlung
language_switching.turkish: PASS - Yükleme, Hediye Kartı Oluştur, Hediye Kartı Kullan, Ödeme
language_switching.chinese: PASS - 充值, 创建礼品卡, 兑换礼品卡, 支付

quick_select_amounts.details: All 6 quick-select buttons present with correct values

mode_tabs_translation.details: All 4 mode tabs (Aufladung, Gutschein erstellen, Gutschein einlösen, Zahlung) translate correctly when language is changed

tab_navigation.details: All tabs are clickable and navigate to correct content
